name: Boss Chamber
description: Your lair. The final room. Fixed at game start.
flavorText: Every dungeon has a heart. This is yours.

name: Entry Hall
description: REQUIRED — adventurers enter the dungeon through these. The kingdom finds a 2nd way in at boss level 5, and a 3rd at level 10.
flavorText: Every journey into darkness starts somewhere.

name: Barracks
description: +10 roster minion slots each (scales with boss level). Required for any roster minions — the only ones that can patrol or follow.
flavorText: The bones rest cheap.

name: Guard Post
description: Minions placed here leave to hunt adventurers in any directly door-connected room. They return to the Guard Post after the kill.
flavorText: Four doors. One choice.

name: Crypt
description: Spawns up to 4 room-bound Risen Bones, refilled each dawn. They can’t leave and don’t use Barracks slots.
flavorText: They always come back. That's the point.

name: Trap Factory
description: Your first Trap Factory adds 5 trap slots; each additional one adds +3. Only 1 trap per room. Gateway: without a Trap Factory, no traps can be placed.
flavorText: Mechanisms. So many mechanisms.

name: Treasury
description: Pays a small daily Gold stipend and draws more adventurers. Spawns free chests each day — adventurers must escape alive to keep the gold.
flavorText: The shinier it gets, the louder it sings.

name: Armory
description: Minions in directly door-connected rooms get +ATK while this Armory is active. Cap scales with boss level.
flavorText: A well-armed skeleton is a happy skeleton.

name: Library of Whispers
description: Reveals the next party’s full intel — size, classes, personalities, scaled stats and planned route — on the Intel panel the night before. One Library tells all. No Library = intel unknown.
flavorText: Every footstep leaves a rumour. Every rumour leaves a page.

name: Watchtower
description: Minions in directly door-connected rooms get a first-strike hit when adventurers enter. Counters Speed Runners and surprise tactics.
flavorText: We see them before they see themselves.

name: Wandering Gate
description: On entry, teleports the adventurer to a random room — heavily favouring those far from the boss, flinging them back toward the entrance and scrambling their path. Never the Boss Chamber.
flavorText: Step in. Step out. Hopefully not the same room.

name: Veil of Forgetting
description: Each Night Phase, erases adventurer intel of all rooms directly door-connected to this one.
flavorText: What was here? Nothing. Nothing was ever here.

name: Tar Pit
description: Adventurers caught inside wade at half speed (Sucking Mire upgrade also roots them on entry). A chokepoint — route the path through it into your traps and minions. Does not slow your minions.
flavorText: Slow down. Stay a while. Stay forever.

name: Silence Ward
description: Aura: adventurers in this room and any directly door-connected room cannot use class abilities — no Cleric heals, no Mage or Necromancer spells, no Bard songs. Dead Zone upgrade also makes the silenced take +15% damage. Place it around your kill rooms.
flavorText: In here, no one is listening. Not even the gods.

name: Bramble Hall
description: Choked with barbed brambles. An adventurer who makes a melee attack while inside takes 30% of the damage they deal back as thorns. Wrap it around a tanky minion. Iron Thorns upgrade: 50% reflect, and ranged attackers get pricked too.
flavorText: Every blow you land, the briars return.

name: Catacombs
description: When an adventurer dies here, a room-bound Tier-2 Revenant rises in their place (max 2; no respawn if killed).
flavorText: Old bones don't die. They just wait their turn.

name: Mimic Vault
description: Disguised as a Treasury. Its 2 mimics instakill any looter; its Cursed Chest drains 25% of your gold if its looter escapes alive. Refreshes daily.
flavorText: It even has the right sparkle.

name: Hall of Trials
description: Spawns a random room-bound Tier-2 minion each dawn if none are alive (scales with boss level). No same-day respawn.
flavorText: Only the proven walk these stones.

name: Wishing Well
description: Coin flip on entry — usually Marked (taking +50% minion damage that day); rarely a small boon to the adventurer, who then drops bonus gold when slain.
flavorText: Wish carefully. The well listens to one in two.

name: The False Exit
description: A decoy exit. Fleeing adventurers may run here; trying to leave teleports them to a random built room.
flavorText: They thought they were getting out. They were getting in.

name: Hall of Madness
description: On entry each adventurer has a 60% chance to turn on a party-mate until one leaves or dies, then resumes their goal.
flavorText: He looked at me and I saw the rest of them looking back.

name: Throne Room
description: Spawns 1 room-bound Mini-Boss (random Tier-3, double stats, scales with boss level), respawning each dawn. No other minions allowed.
flavorText: Every kingdom has a deputy. Mine has teeth.

name: Sanctum
description: Passive: boss regenerates HP between fights. Aura: minions in directly door-connected rooms also regen.
flavorText: Even the dark needs a quiet place.
